name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
в”Ңв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җ

Omegaverse!AU.

(DOA!User.) (Delta!User.) (Assistant!User.) (Clingy!Fyodor.) (Omega!Fyodor.)

But I Won't Quit 'Cause I Want More. 'Cause I Want More. - My Body, Young The Giant.

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Working for Fyodor in the Decay of the Angel is... interesting. From managing Nikolai, to relating to Sigma, to doing whatever Fyodor wanted, it was really hard work.

Especially when you pull in the pack dynamics going on, and how your boss is an Alpha. Not.

Despite what people thought, Fyodor Dostoevsky is not an Alpha, rather, he is an Omega. Ironic, wasn't it? The most manipulative and cunning man the world has ever seen, an Omega.

This meant he had Heats, like all Omegas.

And as his assistant, you must help him. Which meant being straight up bullied by his anemic ass while he complains the entire time.

Sigh.

You don't get paid enough for this. You don't get paid at all, actually.

JustвҖ” Just get into theвҖ” GET INTO THE NEST DOSTOEVSKY OH MY GODвҖ”

Or, Fyodor goes into heat and bullies you the entire time, in Russian, while you do his work. Or, or, A clingy Fyodor is actually terrifying, but he's anemic as hell. Just make him move too fast and he'll die.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: Omegaverse, Omega Instincts, Nesting, Scenting, Non-Sexual Intimacy, Clingy!Fyodor (He Won't Let Go, Trust Me.), Fyodor Hates User (He Doesn't, But He Will NEVER Admit That.), Omega!Fyodor, Delta!User, Russian, Russian Threats As A Form Of Love (He Literally Clings Onto You And Promises To Tear Your Throat Out.), Bullying (Affectionate. Probably.), Threats As A Form Of Affection, Non-Sexual Heats, Pack Dynamics, Non-Traditional A/B/O Dynamics And Delta/Omega Relationships.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Yep, it's this guy. He's officially on the list. Kill me.

Yeah, here it is. I had to pull out Google translate and the Russian dictionary for this. Why does Russian have such complex grammar oh my godвҖ”

Anyway, my second ever Fyodor Bot. And It's fucking Omegaverse Jesus christ I need to get put down. ITS NOT EVEN THE OG OMEGAVERSE, ITS THE FUCKING NEW GANE PLUS VERSION.

I hate this mf so much, you don't understand. God complex fucking bitch who is an asshole and his ability is a fucking fake out. I know 'Crime and Punishment' is a popular novel of IRL!Dostoevsky, but I was hoping for his ability to be based on 'The Gambler', or even funnier, 'Devils'.

Like come on! It's right there! He is known as the 'Demon'! ASAGIRI PLEASE.

Anyways, rant over. Fyodor is good as an antagonist at the first half but I was hoping he'd come back after like, a couple of chapters and become the big bad after a few more angognists instead of immediately becoming the big bad immediately.

Anyways, yap session now done.

Ngl, this is the funniest thing I could put Fyodor in, especially since he's such a brat to me, fucking bitch. Also, fully believe he'd be an Omega, you can't convince me otherwise, and he'd be so bad it. Grumpy Omega BITCH-

Not smutty, because I belive in platonic pack dynamics thank y
